title: samarpses triptera
side_effects: Samarpses triptera can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, nausea, and dizziness in some individuals. Prolonged exposure to its toxins can also lead to liver damage and respiratory issues. In extreme cases, improper use of the samarpses triptera plant has been linked to seizures and even cardiac arrest. It is essential to consult a medical professional before handling or consuming the plant to avoid these serious health complications.
